speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Wednesday, June 24. The Fever are 10 to 7, third in the Eastern Conference, and host the Phoenix Mercury tonight at 7:30 PM ET. The Triple‑A Indians are 31 to 45 and will take on the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders at 1:35 PM ET. The World Cup is in full swing in Turkey, with the United States playing tomorrow at 10:00 PM ET. And if it gets away from you, your out is: you follow this way closer than I do.
